techcrunch.title: Spotify and Universal Music strike deal allowing fan-made AI covers and remixes
techcrunch.summary: Spotify is partnering with  Universal Music Group￼ to let Premium subscribers create AI-generated song covers and remixes, with participating artists receiving a share of the revenue.

techcrunch.title: Six search engines worth trying now that Google isn’t really Google anymore
techcrunch.summary: Google is about to look really different, and if you're not a fan of the AI overview feature, then you're not going to like what's coming.

techcrunch.title: Trump delays AI security executive order, saying language ‘could have been a blocker’
techcrunch.summary: President Trump delayed signing an executive order that would have required pre-release government security reviews of AI models, citing dissatisfaction with the order's language.

techcrunch.title: Spotify adds AI-powered Q&A and briefing generation features to podcasts
techcrunch.summary: Spotify will let you generate daily or weekly briefs based on your prompts

techcrunch.title: Spotify takes on Google’s NotebookLM with its new app
techcrunch.summary: Spotify is releasing the new desktop app as a research preview in more than 20 markets.

techcrunch.title: Spotify launches an ElevenLabs-powered audiobook creation tool
techcrunch.summary: The AI-powered audiobook generation won't bind authors to an exclusive contract, meaning they are free to publish their generated audiobooks anywhere.

techcrunch.title: Hark raises $700M Series A for its secretive ‘universal’ AI interface
techcrunch.summary: Hark expects to release its first multimodal models this summer, which it says will power a personal AI platform that works with existing products and services. The company expects to follow that with hardware devices built specifically for those systems.

techcrunch.title: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alums, hopes to offer safer AI therapy
techcrunch.summary: The Path says its AI model has scored 95 on the mental health safety AI benchmark, Vera-MH. This compares to a top score of 65 for the consumer bots.

techcrunch.title: Google is pitching an AI agent ecosystem to consumers who may not buy it
techcrunch.summary: One of the most promising introductions at Google’s I/O developer conference on Tuesday was a new way for consumers to use the web: AI agents. Unfortunately, it was also the most confusing.

techcrunch.title: With aluminum prices up 20%, recycling startups bet on AI to cash in
techcrunch.summary: Recycling startups are using AI to improve the recovery of critical minerals like aluminum, aiming to build a massive source of the metal.
